name: mol-fix-issue
description: Fix a single GitHub issue end-to-end: investigate, implement, test, review, PR.

issue_id.description: Beads issue ID (e.g., eg4-abc123) or GitHub issue number

steps.title: Investigate: understand the issue
steps.description: Read the beads issue (bd show {{issue_id}}). Read GitHub issue comments. Identify affected files using Grep/Glob. Understand root cause before writing any code. For bugs: reproduce the issue path through code. For features: identify where to add the functionality.

steps.title: Implement: write the fix in a worktree
steps.description: Create worktree (bd worktree create {{branch_prefix}}-{{issue_id}}). Implement the fix following project conventions (base entities, coordinator mixins, f-strings for code, %-formatting for logging). Add/update tests for the change.

steps.title: Validate: run full quality suite
steps.description: Run: uv run ruff check --fix && uv run ruff format, uv run mypy --config-file tests/mypy.ini custom_components/eg4_web_monitor/, uv run pytest tests/ -x --tb=short. All must pass with zero errors.

steps.title: Review: code review and simplify
steps.description: Run code-simplifier on changed files. Run code-reviewer agent on the diff. Fix all issues found. Re-run validation after fixes.

steps.title: Ship: create PR and comment on issue
steps.description: Commit with message referencing GitHub issue (fix: description (#N)). Push branch. Create PR with gh pr create. Comment on GitHub issue with install/test/debug instructions per ship-fix template. Close beads issue.
